title: JourneyState
description: Watermark + spine for the builder radar. Written to content/<profile>/journey/state.json by builder-radar (formerly journey-radar) after each successful run.

last_processed_sha.description: HEAD SHA at the end of the last successful builder-radar run. null = backfill not yet run.

backfill_done.description: True after the first backfill run completes.

series_spine.description: Ordered list of cluster IDs forming the backfill starter series.
